steps: Submit formal tax reclaim to Citigroup Australia for AUD 138,750 excess withholding on BHP dividend citing AU-NO treaty 15% rate
Provide Norwegian tax residency certificate and account documentation to support treaty eligibility
Reference AU Treasury treaty table showing 15% rate applies vs. 25% standard rate withheld
Escalate to Citigroup's dividend reclaim department if initial request is not processed within 30 days

references.title: AU Treasury – Income Tax Treaties Table
ATO – Withholding from Dividends Paid to Foreign Residents
